question.label: Next step focus
question.name: What do you want to get back to feeling steady on first?
question.description: Gets at the most immediate priority for recovery or re-engagement from their point of view.

answer: Priorities — I'm not sure. I just do what's on my board. I can't really tell what's important vs busywork.

assessment.note: They said they can't tell what's important vs busywork, which is a strong clarity signal; the answer did not add new engagement signal beyond the existing drift.

new_queue.label: Ownership shift
new_queue.name: What parts of the frontend work still feel worth leaning into for you?

new_queue.label: Feedback texture
new_queue.name: How has the feedback on your recent work landed for you?

new_queue.label: Stretch gap
new_queue.name: Where do you feel like you're not getting enough stretch right now?

history.answer_excerpt: Honestly kind of drained. I haven't been sleeping well and I'm behind on things.
A bit disconnected. I don't really know the team outside of tickets, and I missed the last two socials.
Honestly kind of drained. I haven't been sleeping well and I'm behind on things.
I've been putting off the follow-up on that PR. Every time I open it I feel a bit sick.
The design-system PR — I got a ton of rework feedback and I'm not sure if I did something wrong or if that's just how reviews go here.
